appliedUpdates.description: Updated the compose-runtime startup note to require `docker compose up -d --build app` with the explicit Flyway-v2/MailHog overrides, and documented that shared-role mutation probes must use a system role name while unknown-lifecycle probes should use protected endpoints and restore the local check constraint afterward.

environmentConstraints: The delegated `user-testing-flow-validator` helper still fails immediately with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-high`, so this round used the approved direct in-session fallback.

The compose-backed runtime must be rebuilt with the explicit override command plus `--build`; `docker compose up -d app` alone can leave a stale image in place even though the container starts successfully.

The compose actuator health surface may still report `503 {"status":"DOWN"}` while the target auth/admin APIs on `8081` are usable, so readiness should be judged from the actual milestone endpoints rather than actuator alone.
